mapper.select: select file_id, project_id, version_id, file_code, original_name, stored_name, file_path, file_size, upload_user_id, upload_date, file_version, file_use_yn, file_identity_key from attach_file where connect_address = #{connect_address}
mapper.insert:
select 'attach_file_' || to_char(sysdate, 'YYMM') || '_' || lpad( nvl(max(to_number(substr(file_id, -4))), 0) + 1, 4, '0' ) from attach_file where substr(file_id, 1, 18) = 'attach_file_' || to_char(sysdate, 'YYMM') || '_'
insert into attach_file ( file_id, project_id, version_id, file_code, original_name, stored_name, file_path, file_size, upload_user_id, file_version, file_use_yn, file_identity_key ) values ( #{fileId}, #{projectId}, #{versionId}, #{fileCode}, #{originalName}, #{storedName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{uploadUserId}, #{fileVersion}, #{connectAddress}, #{fileIdentityKey} )
